name: Rice Krispie Goodies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix caramels, margarine, and condensed milk over the top of a double boiler.
2. Cook until the caramels are melted, stirring constantly. Do not remove from the double boiler.
3. Dip marshmallows in the caramel mixture, then roll them in rice krispies.
4. Place on wax paper-lined trays.
5. Chill in the freezer until the caramel is set.
6. Store in the refrigerator or freezer.
7. They taste similar to Rice Krispie Treats and look like porcupines.
8. Use a shish-ka-bob skewer to dip marshmallows; spray with Pam first so they slide off easily.
9. Be careful to keep the flame on low after it has melted to avoid burning the caramel mixture.
10. Can be made ahead and frozen.
